name: Refrigerator Mat - Polycarbonate Clear
pros: Exceptional value at ¥2,930 with 15,500+ reviews proving reliability
Crystal-clear polycarbonate protects floors from scratches and dents effectively
Works with heated floors and is compatible with washing machines too
cons: Protects floor but doesn't address vibration noise from appliances
Limited innovation—basic protective mat with no smart features
shortDescription: Best-value refrigerator floor protector with massive Japanese customer base.
review: This is the go-to fridge mat for Japanese households, and the ratings prove it. At under ¥3,000, you get durable polycarbonate that actually works on tatami and heated floors—critical in Japan. No assembly needed, just place and forget. Not glamorous, but practical and genuinely affordable.
